description: Modify the bundled Stroop demo experiment located in /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/demos/ using PsychoPy Builder. Update the experiment to include a new 'instructions' routine at the beginning of the flow containing a text component prompting the participant to press the space bar and a keyboard component that waits for the space key. Set the trial loop repetitions (nReps) to 3. Save the modified experiment to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/stroop_modified.psyexp while preserving the original Stroop trial structure and without overwriting the source demo file.
